summary: Full backend + frontend E2E testing for Word→Excel converter passed with 100% success. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests pass (auth, convert single/mixed/all-invalid, jobs list/get/download/delete, unauthorized checks, heading forward-fill verified, Excel headers verified including Document Title/Author). Frontend: all 7 flows verified via Playwright — invalid login shows error, valid login redirects to dashboard, upload mixed .docx + .txt shows unsupported flag in queue and errors block, Convert produces preview table with correct 8 columns, Download Excel returns a valid xlsx (6152 bytes), History lists jobs and supports re-download + delete, logout and protected routes properly redirect to /login.
critical_code_review_comments: Consider client-side pre-validation to strip non-.docx files before upload to save bandwidth (currently backend correctly rejects them).
AuthContext localStorage token works, but adding a 401 axios response interceptor would auto-logout on expired tokens for better UX.
seed_admin() correctly resyncs the admin password when ADMIN_PASSWORD changes — good.
seed_data_creation: Test .docx files generated in-memory via python-docx (fx.docx, t1.docx, del.docx, good.docx) and a fake bad.txt. A few jobs and one deletion were created on the admin account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py using requests + python-docx + openpyxl and share auth token via module-scoped fixture. History accumulates jobs on admin account across runs — safe as tests don't assume exact counts. All data-testids verified working.
